ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic region (e.g., world, sub-region, country) */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region the country belongs to */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language(s) spoken in the country */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "time_frame" INTEGER /* Time frame for the population data (e.g., year) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the geographic region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data category */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_time_frame FOREIGN KEY ("time_frame") REFERENCES time_frames ("time_frame"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data entry */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Data value (e.g., 7772.85) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data value */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality level of the data value */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the region type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region type */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level in the hierarchical structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the country type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country type */,
  "development_index" REAL /* Development index of the country type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_frames" (
  "time_frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time frame */,
  "time_frame" INTEGER /* Time frame (e.g., year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the time frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was versioned */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the data version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy entry */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region */,
  "child_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child region */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_hierarchy_parent_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_hierarchy_child_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy entry */,
  "parent_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent country */,
  "child_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child country */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_hierarchy_child_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_hierarchy_parent_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collection */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the collection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the collection was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
